name: LinkFinder AI — LinkedIn Company Pages → Full Scrape

nodes.name: Read Company URLs from Sheet
nodes.notes:
📋 Sheet1 must have a column named 'linkedin_url'
Example: https://linkedin.com/company/tesla

nodes.name: Linkfinder — Scrape Company
nodes.notes:
🔑 HTTP Header Auth credential:
  Name:  Authorization
  Value: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY

nodes.name: Append to Results Sheet
nodes.notes:
📋 Create a 'Results' tab with headers:
input_url | name | tagline | industry | company_size | follower_count | city | country | founded_on | website | company_email | company_phone | description | linkedin_url
